## Agent need
Agents depend on the tracker as the source of truth, so its state must be crash-safe and fully auditable — any past context must be recoverable.

## Delivered surface (pm-o2kc)
Atomic writeFileAtomic; append-only history + replay; drift-scan + history-repair; history-compact/redact; checkpoint rollback GC; item-format-version migration; front-matter + settings read caches.

## Verified by
History determinism tests, drift-scan checks, restore integration specs. Enduring agent-value statement for the storage/durability capability; new work lands in pm-o2kc.
As a coding agent, I want every mutation to be atomic and fully replayable from an append-only history, so that I can trust the tracker's state and recover any prior context at any time

Writes are atomic (no partial or NUL-corrupt files); the append-only history replays to reconstruct any item; history drift is detectable and repairable; format-version migrations are gated and reversible.
Delivered and maintained by pm-o2kc: atomic writes, append-only replayable history, drift detection/repair, checkpoint GC, and gated format migration.
The tracker state is crash-safe, auditable, and fully recoverable.
Atomic-write + append-only history + replay + drift-repair + checkpoint GC shipped and tested for determinism.
